title: leontodon × borbasii
intro: Leontodon × borbasii, also known as Borbas' hawk's beard, is a rare hybrid plant that occurs naturally in certain regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including the relief of digestive issues and the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Leontodon × borbasii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for widespread use.
